name: Apple iPhone 16
description: The standard iPhone reimagined with the new A18 chip, Camera Control button, and a 48 MP Fusion camera system. Featuring a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display, Apple Intelligence integration, and the longest battery life ever in a standard iPhone. Runs iOS 18.

specifications.value: 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR OLED, 60 Hz, 2556 × 1179 px, 2000 nits peak
48 MP main Fusion (f/1.6) + 12 MP ultrawide (f/2.2) with autofocus
Ceramic Shield front, textured matte glass back, aluminium frame

additionalInfo.value: Apple Inc., One Apple Park Way, Cupertino, CA 95014

reviews.title: The best non-Pro iPhone Apple has made
reviews.reviewText: The A18 chip is blazing fast, the camera now focuses in ultrawide (a first for the standard model!), and the Camera Control button is genuinely useful once you practise. Battery life is noticeably better than my old iPhone 13. Very happy.

reviews.title: Smooth and reliable, as expected
reviews.reviewText: iOS 18 is polished and the A18 handles everything without a hint of lag. Face ID is instant, the screen looks beautiful, and it fits perfectly in one hand. Apple Intelligence features are genuinely helpful for summarising notifications.

reviews.title: Great phone, missing the telephoto
reviews.reviewText: Coming from an iPhone 14 Pro, I miss the dedicated telephoto lens. Otherwise this is a stellar upgrade — faster, lighter, much better battery. For most people this is the perfect iPhone.

reviews.title: Incredible value for money
reviews.reviewText: At $799 this is genuinely good value for a flagship phone. Performance is Pro-class thanks to the A18, and the camera improvements over iPhone 15 are meaningful. The Teal colour is stunning in person.

reviews.title: Camera Control takes getting used to
reviews.reviewText: I accidentally launched the camera constantly in the first week by swiping the Camera Control button. After a couple of weeks it feels natural. The photos this phone produces are outstanding — skin tones look especially natural.
